steps.title: Use Desmos to fit the table
steps.content: Enter the table rows as $x_1=[0,1]$ and $y_1=[38,43]$. Then type the linear regression row $y_1 \sim m x_1+b$. Desmos returns $m=5$ and $b=38$, so the function is $f(x)=5x+38$.

steps.title: Match the choices
steps.content: Choice B is $f(x)=5x+38$, exactly the model Desmos found. Choice D has the same y-intercept but slope 48, so it is much too steep. Choices A and C have different intercepts. Therefore choice B is correct.
